programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 13
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Great Traverse Taiwan: Crossing The Ultimate Sky Route
programme.desc: Adventurer Tanaka Yoki embarks on a new challenge. In Taiwan-an island the size of Kyushu with over 200 peaks exceeding 3,000 meters, including Yushan, taller than Mount Fuji-he traverses from east to west along perilous high-altitude routes. Beyond the hardships awaits a breathtaking world of vast cloud seas and sweeping mountain panoramas, reminding him of his own smallness. As his journey moves beyond Japan, a new chapter of his adventure unfolds. What lies beyond the finish line?

programme.title: E116 - #Twinfection
programme.desc: In order to prove she is clever, Cat plays a trick on Sam using a pair of twins that they are babysitting. Sam turns to her own twin, Melanie, to play a trick on Cat.

programme.title: E115 - Taken to the Cleaners / Mugshot
programme.desc: Best and Bester go on an undercover mission to find out why items of laundry are going missing at the Dry Cleaners. // In an unfortunate case of mistaken identity, Best has been mistaken for the notorious jewel thief, Jimmy Muggins.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E808 - Karaless Whisper / Dollars and Scents
programme.desc: Lincoln and friends try to befriend new girl Kara when they learn she has access to a legendary missing comic book. // Miguel enlists Leni's help when he launches his own perfume line at Reininger's.

programme.title: E720 - Riddle School / Love Me Tenor
programme.desc: The Action News team springs into action to figure out who is behind a mysterious string of pranks. // When Lincoln and friends discover Gus has a hidden talent, they work together to help him live out his dream.

programme.title: E256 - SpongeBob in Randomland / SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. // SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he also can't figure out why!

programme.title: E610 - Bummer Camp / Sleepstakes
programme.desc: When Gramps struggles to run Camp Mastadon, the kids come to his rescue. //The Loud kids help Lana get over her fear of sleepovers.

programme.title: E213 - Best Summer Ever! Part 1 / Best Summer Ever! Part 2
programme.desc: The family throws Jack a goodbye party, but he only cares about impressing his mom if she comes to Canyon Valley. // The end of the summer has arrived and the kids go on a wild adventure to get Jack to the airport on time.

programme.title: E905 - Prom-Com / Scene Steeler
programme.desc: When Leni is put in charge of the school's prom, she is determined to make it the most memorable night ever. // Lincoln and Clyde cast Luan as the villain, Bee Trayal, in their David Steele film and have to deal with her method acting.

programme.title: E205 - Captain Man: On Vacation
programme.desc: Ray has trusted Henry and Charlotte with protecting Swellview while he’s out of town at his cousin's wedding. Problems arise when they find themselves having to handle things on their own.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E103 - Escape from New Yoke
programme.desc: The rebels battle the Chaos Council to secure the 'Crystal' that gives the Council supreme power. Sonic assumes this crystal is the Paradox Prism, but he's stunned by the truth about the Power Crystal... and the events that shattered the world.

programme.title: E107 - The Truth is Out There
programme.desc: Acu thinks a fish-loving alien is in town, and Mica offers to help him track it down.

programme.desc: When Gramps struggles to run Camp Mastadon, the kids come to his rescue. //The Loud kids help Lana get over her fear of sleepovers.

programme.title: E19 - Burn Run
programme.desc: As Simone is doing office inventory, she uncovers a trail of bodies that leads her to investigate a case involving a reclusive business tycoon.

programme.title: E4 - K9: The Rext Generation
programme.desc: When a precocious K9-in-training leads her partner to a real crime scene, she uses her personal connection to the case to help Major Crimes bring justice to the victim's family.

programme.title: E7 - Fadeaway
programme.desc: When a large-scale explosion rocks a Brooklyn apartment complex, the team quickly locates the perpetrator and discovers he's acting on the orders of a convicted felon currently serving time.

programme.title: E3 - Out Of Pocket
programme.desc: Ahead of Bailey's return home, John looks for clues to locate Jason Wyler. Then, Tim and Lucy swap rookies; a friendly face resurfaces at the station, and Wesley feels unsettled over Angela.

programme.title: E1 - The Promise
programme.desc: The team heads to Mexico to escort a fugitive back to the States when things go awry and Hondo has to save an old witness tied to the case.

programme.title: E3 - Out Of Pocket
programme.desc: Ahead of Bailey's return home, John looks for clues to locate Jason Wyler. Then, Tim and Lucy swap rookies; a friendly face resurfaces at the station, and Wesley feels unsettled over Angela.

programme.title: You're OK, I'm OK
programme.desc: Twenty-five year old Liang Shao Chiang leads a boring life working as an auditor in a big finance corporation. He only has eyes for the receptionist Chow Yun-Lan. Chow is young and pretty, and is the natural target for the bunch of horny men around her. But she is pert and secretive, and no one is able to get even a date from her. Liang has fallen deeper and deeper for Chow. Alas this love is not reciprocative. But suddenly there is a breakthrough in his career, for four managers of the company is recommending a promotion for him! Of course, there is a price behind this - Liang has to let them use his bachelor apartment for conducting love affairs! Soon this scandal travels to the ears of the general manager Mr. Lui...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Sammo Hung (Part 2)
programme.desc: In the last episode, Sammo Hung shared his story of being an action-choreographer, director and actor for over half a century in the film industry. Now he is going to talk more about apprenticeship with his master Yu Jim-yuen whom he learned the martial arts philosophy from and his journey of growing next-generation action stars; also give us an insight into the challenges towards Hong Kong action film nowadays.

programme.title: Flirting Scholar
programme.desc: Tong Park Foo is the top-grade scholar in Suzhou. On a feast day, Tong and his friends go to visit the temple and there, Tong meets Chau Heung for the first time. Tong is shaken at Chau's beauty. He decides to go after her. But Chau's master Mrs. Wah is very angry with Tong's family, how can Tong make Chau Heung his bride?

programme.title: Born Wild
programme.desc: Twin brothers Tan and Tide had been fought for the best until Tan died. Tide investigates the death and meets Tan's lover Sandy. Tide finds himself being attracted to her warmth...

programme.title: Body Weapon
programme.desc: A brutal murder occurs in the moonlight: a masked killer and his two accompanies execute a couple in an extremely sadistic way. Organized crime investigators KWAN, LEE and LING start to investigate into the case promptly. LING has a charming character and both men are in love with her. LING faces a dilemma and decides to give both men a fair competition. No sooner have they resolved the love triangle that they face great disasters. On the wedding night of LING and LEE, three masked killers break into their house, slay LEE and force LING to engage in S. M...

programme.title: Born Wild
programme.desc: Twin brothers Tan and Tide had been fought for the best until Tan died. Tide investigates the death and meets Tan's lover Sandy. Tide finds himself being attracted to her warmth...

programme.title: Superstars Sunday: The Hand Of Death
programme.desc: The Shaolin Temple is the center of Chinese martial arts and the cradle of anti-Manchu patriots in the 17th century. However, a Shaolin renegade Shih has defected to the Manchu and is leading a suppression of patriots trying to overthrow the Qing Dynasty. Tan Hsiung, a patriot, is arrested and killed by Shih. The Shaolin Abbot thus calls on his best student, Yun Fei to stop Shih from killing more people. Yun happens to find help from another anti-Manchu patriot, Tan, who is actually Tan Hsiung's younger brother. Along with help of Zorro, a master swordsman...

programme.title: The Dragon Family
programme.desc: Hong Kong's godfather Dragon family believes his underworld should turn legitimate. His four 'families' support him but the 'pusher' violates the agreement. Dragon has him executed in public. But White Wolf No.2 in command, starts to challenge the old man. His two assistants, Joseph and Kirl, who intend to take over the narotic trade, set a trap for Tom, one of Dragon's six sons. In the melee, Kirl kills Dragon. Joseph persuades White Wolf to a massacre of the Dragon Family and the four 'families' during the funeral. At the same times, he kills White Wolf and sets his foot in the high society...

programme.title: The Hand Of Death

programme.desc: American artist Jeff Koons reflects on his early days, talks about what inspires his work, and discusses why he believes art should be 'accessible'.

programme.title: The Cost Of Brexit
programme.desc: A decade after the UK voted to leave the European Union, Bloomberg Originals examines the economic fallout of Brexit and the political forces it unleashed.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, hosted by David Westin in New York.

programme.title: E3 - Highlight 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: Across Africa
programme.desc: Across Africa is a weekly news program presenting latest updates and stories from the African continent to the world. Get up-to-date full coverage of politics, social events, economic analysis with the help of our team of professional reporters.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The 51 Percent
programme.desc: The 51 Percent is revolving around women and their role in the world. The program presents various stories of women with different backgrounds, women fighting for equality, women in politics and their work, women promoting sexual education all over the world, women in sports, and women on the front line.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E9 - 00後求職小伙被職場整頓

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.

programme.title: E478
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.
Chief Editor's Time: Daily key issues around the world are discussed on Chief Editor's Time. In-depth analyses and discussion gives viewers a better understanding of the issue.

programme.title: E228
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: E392
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.

Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.

programme.desc: Experience the powerful, colourful phenomena that swirl across the heavens in North America. Watch polar bears search for food under the aurora borealis, map the frigid path of a polar vortex, and elude violent tornadoes with a prairie dog family.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: E6 - Youngsters of the Desert
programme.desc: A young lion cub must survive as his family is torn apart; two adolescent leopard cubs must fend for themselves after they are abandoned, and a young adult blackbuck must risk life and limb as he tries to secure his first mating.

programme.title: E6 - Heir to the Clan
programme.desc: Spotty, a female hyena cub, is destined to be leader of the Chimbwe clan that lives in the heart of Zambia’s Luangwa Valley. But she has yet to prove herself. Witness her fight to find her place in this savagely competitive family.

programme.title: E1 - Back to School
programme.desc: Start a promising new term at the Orangutan Jungle School in Borneo. See newbie Bumi struggle to focus, track skittish Rumba’s first timid steps toward independence, and cheer on star student Valentino as he experiences a bumpy start to college.

programme.title: E3 - Hard Lessons
programme.desc: Shudder as food-obsessed Beni gets a dramatic, educational smackdown from the local dominant male, Petruk. See spoiled rich kid Spanser, a former illegal pet, try to tamp down his sweet tooth before roguish Bumi goes on a wild joyride with Greta.

programme.title: E1 - Back to School
programme.desc: Start a promising new term at the Orangutan Jungle School in Borneo. See newbie Bumi struggle to focus, track skittish Rumba’s first timid steps toward independence, and cheer on star student Valentino as he experiences a bumpy start to college.

programme.title: E3 - Hard Lessons

programme.title: E5 - Pacific Islands: Commotion in the Ocean
programme.desc: Live through a sunny tropical September day with creatures from Polynesia to the Indonesian archipelago. See how the sun affects the movement, feeding habits, and mating rituals of everything from tiny zooplankton to whale sharks.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

E61 - Bonito And Leek With Marigold In Bordeaux
programme.desc: Alessandra Montagne travels to Bordeaux to meet local farmers. On the menu for the day: a recipe based on locally sourced vegetables and mushrooms.

programme.title: E4 - Split Pea Veloute, Chickpea Gnocchi
programme.desc: Accompanied by Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers a coconut curry split pea veloute and chickpea gnocchi. Discovery of the day: cold-pressed fruit juices from Valais.

programme.title: E7 - Peruwelz
programme.desc: Peruwelz, in the Tournaisis region: a rich stop, well worth a visit for its many green and architectural assets. The town, crossed by two canals, is home to many treasures: the Basilica of Our Lady of Bon-Secours, numerous castles and mansions, the Escaut Plains Nature Park.

programme.title: E4 - Split Pea Veloute, Chickpea Gnocchi
programme.desc: Accompanied by Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers a coconut curry split pea veloute and chickpea gnocchi. Discovery of the day: cold-pressed fruit juices from Valais.

programme.title: E5 - The New Era Of Royals!
programme.desc: Spotlight on Elisabeth, Duchess of Brabant, who, on the eve of her 24th birthday, is redefining royal codes. Also: the enthronement of Guillaume, new Grand Duke of Luxembourg; the princely world reveals its contrasts; traditions, hidden lineages and scandals expose the true face of today's dynasties.

programme.title: E18 - Plum Cake With Hazelnut Streusel
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Patrick Beick, retired gourmet. Together, they're going to make a delicious plum cake with a hazelnut streusel.

programme.title: E1 - The Pre-Alps
programme.desc: Created in 2012 to ensure its preservation and sustainable development, the Prealpes d'Azur Regional Nature Park covers ninety thousand hectares. Its wide-ranging altitude and its dual climate, Alpine and Mediterranean, have shaped exceptional landscapes. Today, it is recognized as a global biodiversity hotspot.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: The remaining competitors must create a dish using a selection of unpopular ingredients in Quebec. Along the way, a surprise announcement shakes up all their plans.

programme.title: E12 - Maison Des Canuts/Sarah Valente/Thibaut Thierry
programme.desc: The Maison des Canuts traces the long tradition of Lyon's gold, silver and silk weavers. Each creation by visual artist Sarah Valente sounds like a call from the forest. Zomer is turning fashion upside down. In Brittany, craftsman Thibaut Thierry works paper with seaweed.

programme.title: E1 - Aurelia Paoli/Lucien Gau Foundry
programme.desc: We meet the designer Aurelia Paoli, head of the Beauregard design studio. All the expertise of Lucien Gau, decorative bronze foundry since 1860.

programme.title: E5 - The Nannup Four - Simon Says
programme.desc: Jim and Cath McDougall are left reeling as the true depth of Simon Kadwill's deception is revealed. Dominique tracks down people from his past and gets a startling insight into how Simon may have ended up on the path he did.

programme.title: E6 - The Nannup Four - Northcliffe
programme.desc: As a family friend and former policeman continues to search for answers decades after the Nannup Four vanished, family and friends of Chantelle try to find their own answers, as one last glimmer of hope emerges. (Final)

programme.title: E15 - Sri Lanka Cricket Prabath Nissanka
programme.desc: Migrant families and athletes of multicultural heritage are changing Australia's sporting culture. From social sport to elite athletes, Paul Kennedy examines how sport helps build community, identity and opportunity.

programme.title: E12 - Game, Net And Match
programme.desc: The lively wolves' team confronts a more sedate but very well-organised tortoise team in the sitting volleyball competition.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene:2025-2026
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: Fashion, food, sport, urban culture, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the French touch. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets a new generation of creators and puts the spotlight on a bold and uninhibited French-speaking world.

programme.title: Maman A Disparu
programme.desc: Louise and Celine, two sisters separated by life, meet again after the suspicious disappearance of their mother. As the local police investigate the case, the sisters, despite their very different characters, are convinced that she didn't just disappear without reason and decide to work together on their own investigation.

programme.title: E12 - The Best Of All Schools
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: E13 - Ping Pong Crash
programme.desc: Dog unfortunately injures Crow during a table tennis match and risks being eliminated.

programme.title: A Bon Entendeur:2026
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. The programme addresses economic, social, environmental and health issues and talks about leisure activities, technology...

programme.title: E1 - Destination Morocco
programme.desc: From cosmopolitan Tangier to the edges of the Sahara, an exciting journey across Morocco to meet those who keep the French language alive. In this French-speaking country, French is neither an official language nor a dead one, but a living language of expression, creation, and transmission.

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E9 - Satisfying Sleep Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! Blippi shrinks down to fly inside a beehive & learn how honey is made, & explores a garbage truck to find out why flies love it so much. Then, it’s a trip through a factory to see how chocolate is made! The adventure even travels through time as Blippi meets his great-grandpa to see the very first cars. Plus, Blippi & FETCH help a nervous crane learn to build a skyscraper!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E7 - JJ's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a big animal adventure with JJ! The fun starts on Grandpa's farm, where JJ learns all about the animals & the sounds they make. He even helps give a sheep a bath! Then, it's time to head to the ocean. Join JJ & his family as they visit an aquarium & sing 'Baby Shark' with a real shark family! The adventure gets prehistoric when Ms. Appleberry teaches the class all about their favorite dinosaurs. From guessing games to meeting Bingo the dog, it's a wild day!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Fun Learning Fundamentals!
programme.desc: It's time to learn the fundamentals with JJ! Join him & his friends as they practice their numbers by counting baby chicks with Grandpa & singing about five little monkeys jumping on the bed. Then, it's time to learn about colors! Watch as the kids paint plain toy cars with a splash of color & help Ms. Appleberry mix primary colors with jello to make secondary colors. From learning shapes to making yummy rainbow popsicles, this adventure is full of learning fun!

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! programme.title: the Memorial Tournament presented by Workday
the Memorial Tournament presented by Workday
Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

Baogu Produces -Martial Arts Tour
programme.desc: Brian Le, one of the stars of the action-packed film “The Furious,” recently visited Hong Kong for a passionate martial arts pilgrimage. Besides visiting the 'Bruce Lee Exhibition' to pay tribute to the legendary master, he also visited a martial arts school to meet with Master Sam Lau, a first-generation disciple of Ip Man, and engage in a martial arts exchange! Brian will now reveal the highlights of his exhilarating martial arts pilgrimage!

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E278 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Martial Arts Tour
programme.desc: Brian Le, one of the stars of the action-packed film “The Furious,” recently visited Hong Kong for a passionate martial arts pilgrimage. Besides visiting the 'Bruce Lee Exhibition' to pay tribute to the legendary master, he also visited a martial arts school to meet with Master Sam Lau, a first-generation disciple of Ip Man, and engage in a martial arts exchange! Brian will now reveal the highlights of his exhilarating martial arts pilgrimage!

programme.title: E405 - Dora & Diego Rescue Baby Jaguar / Diego's Awesome Owl Adventure
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego rescue a baby jaguar after it gets lost deep in the rainforest. // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a baby burrowing owl find its parents and make it home.

programme.title: E204 - Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: E202 - The Crew Builds A Train Station / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Sign
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mooreen. // Popstar Sierra Sparkle is moving to Builder Cove! But when the pups plan a surprise greeting, Speed Meister makes a plan of his own.

programme.title: E103 - Rocket Race / Magic / Parents
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E215 - Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: E209 - Uncle Tiberius
programme.desc: Tim goes to DinoStar's training academy, but is confused by his hero's training methods.

programme.title: E226 - The Eye Test
programme.desc: Pedro Pony wears glasses. Peppa thinks she might need glasses too, so Mummy Pig takes her to the optician. Peppa is a little disappointed to discover that she has perfect vision – but that doesn't stop her wearing some rather fabulous sunglasses.

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds A Pancake Cafe / The Crew Builds An Airplane Wash
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew wants to make the biggest pancake ever! But it's a sticky situation when Speed Meister wants to beat them to it. // When Camila's plane gets dirty from leading migrating ducks home, the pups find a way to wash the plane... in the sky!

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E720 - Valentine's Day Rescue
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day! But when Zeg, Darington and Starla get lost on their way to the Valentine's Day party, it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue them.

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds A Pancake Cafe / The Crew Builds An Airplane Wash
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew wants to make the biggest pancake ever! But it's a sticky situation when Speed Meister wants to beat them to it. // When Camila's plane gets dirty from leading migrating ducks home, the pups find a way to wash the plane... in the sky!

programme.title: E202 - A Pinata For Mami / Invisi-Swiper
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a pinata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives. / Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: E205 - The Cloud Kingdom
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Vicky the Vicuna who is missing her magic flute that she needs to go back to the Cloud Kingdom.

programme.title: E114 - The Elf Windmill / The Elf Band
programme.desc: Mr Elf demonstrates why it takes so long to make flour, but Nanny Plum refuses to wait, and uses magic to speed up the elf windmill. // Holly and her parents try to impress Snobby King and Queen Marigold with help from the elf band.

programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: Entertainment
programme.desc: Akhil Akshay Kumar finds out that he is the heir of 300 million. However, his life goes Topsy-turvy when he learns that the empire goes to Entertainment a dog. 2014. Release Year: 2014 Director: Sajid, Farhad Awards: 2014 Winner Reader's Choice- Best Actor in a Negative Role- Sonu Sood

programme.title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai!

programme.title: Recipe For Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: My Neighbor, Charles
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.
